1010011111110001000111101000000101101100100100110101010 - ASI: 24

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  001 = 00 * 1
  011 = 0 * 11
  111 = 1 * 11
  1000 = 10 * 00
  1010 = 10 * 10
  00001 = 00 * 001
  10100 = 1010 * 0
  001001 = 001 * 001
  011001 = 011 * 001
  1000111 = 1000 * 111
  1111000 = 111 * 1000
  00001011 = 00001 * 011
  10100111 = 10100 * 111
  10101010 = 1010 * 1010
  100011110100 = 1000111 * 10100
  00001011011001 = 00001011 * 011001
  00100110101010 = 001001 * 10101010
  101001111111000 = 10100111 * 1111000
  101001111111000100011110100 = 101001111111000 * 100011110100
  0000101101100100100110101010 = 00001011011001 * 00100110101010
  1010011111110001000111101000000101101100100100110101010 = 101001111111000100011110100 * 0000101101100100100110101010
